input.subject: Project Phoenix Kickoff - Please Join!
input.snippet: Hi team! It's time to kick off Project Phoenix...
input.body_text:
Hi team!

It's time to kick off Project Phoenix! I'm excited to get this initiative started.

KICKOFF MEETING
==============
Date: Wednesday, February 18, 2026
Time: 10:00 AM - 11:30 AM
Room: Innovation Lab (3rd floor)

Calendar invite to follow.

AGENDA:
1. Project overview and goals
2. Team introductions and roles
3. Technical architecture overview
4. Sprint planning approach
5. Communication and tooling
6. Q&A

PRE-WORK (Optional but helpful):
- Review the PRD doc: [link]
- Think about potential risks
- Bring your questions!

Looking forward to building something great together.

Dan

--
Daniel Kim
Senior Product Manager

events.title: Project Phoenix Kickoff
events.description: Project kickoff meeting with team introductions and planning
